description: The canonical knowledge split. Breadcrumbs with lifecycle remain work items; memories/reflections are signed note entities. One canonical knowledge record with two faces (CLI and web); embeddings/search indexes remain projections.
invariants: Deleting/rebuilding the search projection does not alter canonical records
Duplicate suggestions are advisory and do not silently discard a new fact
Both faces read the same canonical record from regista
Memories and reflections are signed note entities, not work items
Breadcrumbs are work items with lifecycle (open/in_progress/done/etc.)
